nodes.label: Home Screen — Active Session with Time Display (Top)
nodes.description: Home tab active session state showing hero section at top. Timer shows 'RECUPERASTE 13:44' with '15:16 quedan' and stats '30 min - 13 min de claridad'. 'Finalizar sesión' CTA. Below timer: 'Sin apps protegidas' row with 'Activar' CTA button (teal/green). Then 'Tu ritual de hoy' empty state and 'Mi aprendizaje del día' with '3 contenidos en sesión' counter. Key difference from home-active-scroll: no apps are blocked, shows 'Sin apps protegidas — Activar' prompt.

nodes.label: Sin Apps Protegidas — Activar CTA Row
nodes.description: Row element shown when no apps are blocked in an active session. Displays shield icon (empty/grey), text 'Sin apps protegidas', and a teal 'Activar' pill button to prompt user to set up app blocking.

nodes.label: Mi Aprendizaje del Día — 3 Contenidos en Sesión
nodes.description: Learning section 'Mi aprendizaje del día' showing '3 contenidos en sesión' counter with + add button. Populated state contrasting with empty state in other screens.
